query:
INSERT INTO shop_settings (`key`, `value`, `label`, `category`, `updatedBy`) VALUES
('laborRate', '115', 'Shop Labor Rate ($/hr)', 'pricing', 'system'),
('taxRate', '8', 'Sales Tax Rate (%)', 'pricing', 'system'),
('shopSupplyFee', '15', 'Shop Supply Fee ($)', 'pricing', 'system'),
('shopName', 'Nick''s Tire & Auto', 'Shop Name', 'general', 'system'),
('shopPhone', '216-862-0005', 'Shop Phone', 'contact', 'system'),
('shopAddress', '17625 Euclid Ave, Cleveland, OH 44112', 'Shop Address', 'contact', 'system'),
('shopEmail', 'nickstireandauto@gmail.com', 'Shop Email', 'contact', 'system'),
('monFriOpen', '8:00 AM', 'Mon-Sat Open', 'hours', 'system'),
('monFriClose', '6:00 PM', 'Mon-Sat Close', 'hours', 'system'),
('sunOpen', '9:00 AM', 'Sunday Open', 'hours', 'system'),
('sunClose', '4:00 PM', 'Sunday Close', 'hours', 'system'),
('smsBatchSize', '50', 'SMS Campaign Batch Size', 'sms', 'system'),
('smsEnabled', 'true', 'SMS Sending Enabled', 'sms', 'system')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
